prompt: Torrential rain falling in heavy sheets against a dark stormy sky, with a single banner or flag on a pole silhouetted against the clouds, whipping violently in wind. High contrast — near-black sky with white rain streaks. The rain is dense and dramatic, almost like a wall of water. Wind energy visible in the flag's movement. Epic, elemental, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
